english.headline: Marks in Front of Goal: Alek Delivers Away
english.commentator: Hammond Park travelled to Roleystone and came home with a massive 98 to 16 win, and number 13 was right in the middle of the good stuff! Alek came on early and got busy — strong in the midfield with good pressure, then dangerous up forward, where he pulled in mark after mark right in front of goal to create chance after chance. He read a beautiful grab on the goal line, and when his moment came he stood up and kicked a ripping goal! Add four disposals from four — a perfect day with ball in hand — and six tackles from eight, and that's a complete performance: one goal, one behind, seven points. Keep taking those grabs in front of goal and working on that shot, number 13, and the goals are going to keep coming!
